prompt: How do I get the newest version of the ram plugin? I heard there's a new skill I want to try out.
assertions: Runs or instructs `claude plugin marketplace update ram-companies` before attempting the update
Asks whether to update at `user` or `project` scope before running the update, since the prompt doesn't specify
Runs or instructs `claude plugin update ram@ram-companies` (with `--scope project` if that's the resolved scope)
Suggests verifying the result with `claude plugin list`
